title: Storm Jangmi Nears Tokyo, Flights Halted
summary: Tropical Storm Jangmi is bearing down on Tokyo, bringing heavy rain, strong winds and widespread disruption. Nearly 880 flights have been canceled at airports in the Tokyo area, while power outages have been reported across Japan. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Extends Advance as US-Iran Peace Talk Progress Stalls
summary: Oil rose for a third day on pessimism over the prospects of the US and Iran reaching a peace deal and as fresh fighting flared up in the Middle East.

Democrats Sanders and Warren Push Labor Department to Abandon Bitcoin 401(k) Rule
